name: Eggsplosion
author: Poki
description: Eggsplosion is a chirpy merge game that lets you create your own coop of chickens. Buy and collect fresh eggs to hatch new baby chickens, and combine them to create amazing new variations! Can you find all the chickens? How to play Eggsplosion? Tap on an egg to hatch it. Merge similar chickens to create a new one. Move the chickens to a nest to collect more eggs. Repeat! Who created Eggsplosion? Eggsplosion is created by Endless Pixels. Play their other games on Poki: Zombie Rush , Zombie Bounce , Brainrot Craft , and Paper Block ! How can I play Eggsplosion for free? You can play Eggsplosion for free on Poki. Can I play Eggsplosion on mobile devices and desktop? Eggsplosion can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
